response.justification: Candidate brings 10+ years full-stack experience with primary stack technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and currently works on AI agent infrastructure—a rare skill. Strong alignment with craftsmanship and testing culture. Main gap is no explicit Nest.js mention, though deep Node.js/TypeScript foundation suggests rapid adoption. Exceeds seniority and general technical requirements.
